##LOCALITY=Hoskins mine, near Grenfell, New South Wales, Australia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Marcus Origlieri
##DESCRIPTION=Dark red granular, associated with namansilite, R070006
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R050244
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Na_1.00_Na_2.00_(Mn^2+^_2.00_(Mn^3+^_2.35_Fe^3+^_0.63_Al_0.02_))Si_8.00_O_22_O_2_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder, appears to be a mix of ungarettiite and namansilite, cell parameters are from single crystal
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.85 b: 17.84 c: 5.287 alpha: 90 beta: 105.21 gamma: 90 volume: 896.6 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
